inputs.label: Loan Amount
inputs.businessContext: The initial principal balance of the FHA loan, excluding upfront MIP if financed separately.

businessContext_i18n.en: The initial principal balance of the FHA loan, excluding upfront MIP if financed separately.
businessContext_i18n.tr: FHA kredisinin başlangıç anapara bakiyesi (finanse edilmişse peşin MIP hariç).
businessContext_i18n.de: Der anfängliche Kapitalsaldo des FHA-Darlehens, ohne die separat finanzierte Vorab-MIP.

inputs.label: Interest Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual nominal interest rate for the loan.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual nominal interest rate for the loan.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kredi için yıllık nominal faiz oranı.

inputs.label: Loan Term
inputs.businessContext: Total duration of the loan in years.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total duration of the loan in years.

inputs.label: Annual Property Tax
inputs.businessContext: Total annual property tax amount for the home.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total annual property tax amount for the home.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ev için toplam yıllık emlak vergisi tutarı.

inputs.label: Annual Hazard Insurance
inputs.businessContext: Total annual premium for hazard/homeowners insurance.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total annual premium for hazard/homeowners insurance.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tehlike/ev sahibi sigortası için toplam yıllık prim.

inputs.label: Annual MIP Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual FHA Mortgage Insurance Premium rate as a percentage of the loan amount (e.g., 0.85 for 30-year, >95% LTV).

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual FHA Mortgage Insurance Premium rate as a percentage of the loan amount (e.g., 0.85 for 30-year, >95% LTV).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kredi tutarının yüzdesi olarak yıllık FHA Mortgage Sigortası Prim oranı (örneğin, 30 yıl, >%95 LTV için 0,85).
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährlicher FHA-Hypothekenversicherungsprämiensatz als Prozentsatz des Darlehensbetrags (z. B. 0,85 für 30 Jahre, >95% LTV).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
